articles.title: $SHIB News: Gold Purchases, Shibarium Success, and Popularity in India
articles.description: Shiba Inu (SHIB), the meme-based cryptocurrency capturing headlines in recent months, continues to make waves with its latest developments. In one of the latest developments, BitPay, a leading crypto payment processor, has announced that customers can now buy gold with the cryptocurrencies it supports, including $SHIB. The move is part of BitPay’s effort to expand […]

articles.title: Canada’s Largest Pension Fund to Stay Away From Crypto After Writing off FTX Investment
articles.description: “It’d be unwise for us to rush” into another crypto investment based on what happened with FTX, CEO Taylor said.

articles.title: Top-20 Dogecoin Whale Gobbles Up Another $12,400,000 in DOGE As Top Memecoin Continues To Bleed
articles.description: A top-20 Dogecoin (DOGE) whale is adding to its stash as the top memecoin continues to struggle through the week. Blockchain-monitoring service Dogecoin Whale Alert initially spotted the movement of the large DOGE trove worth millions of dollars. Dogecoin Whale Alert notes that a top-20 wallet transferred 159,347,709 DOGE worth more than $12.42 million to […]

articles.title: Here’s what’s next for BNB after a spike in its transaction volume
articles.description: BNB's transaction volume rose to its highest level since the beginning of March. However, it's still uncertain if this would end in a bullish shift.

articles.title: Trust Wallet Users Lose $170,000 to Vulnerability
articles.description: Trust Wallet reported a WebAssembly (WASM) vulnerability in its Wallet Core led led to the loss of $170,000.

articles.title: Cardano's Wrapped BTC Testnet Launches as Plus to Network: Details
articles.description: Cardano network welcomes wrapped Bitcoin as anetaBTC testnet launches

articles.title: Ethereum after Shapella: Developers make progress on Cancun-Deneb upgrade
articles.description: Following the recent, Shapella upgrade, Ethereum developers are now making progress on the next upgrade — referred to as "Cancun-Deneb."

articles.title: Trust Wallet fixes vulnerability after $170,000 in user losses, plans reimbursements
articles.description: Trust Wallet reported that it identificated and resolved of a major WebAssembly (WASM) vulnerability within its core wallet software library.
